name: Skyforge Sentinels
legend: Patient line holders with bright shields and louder horns.

name: Cloudhook Adepts
legend: Rope teams who read the wind by the pull of their hooks.

name: Argent Fulcrum
legend: A walking balance-engine that anchors the line with calibrated thunder.
notes: Large sample profile for full-page layout checks.

name: Emberfen Lancers
legend: Fast riders who mark safe paths through hot marshlight.

name: Cinder Scribes
legend: Archivists who carry glowing ledgers and insist the battle has footnotes.

name: Furnace Colossus
legend: A brass-bound giant made for stress-testing large-card composition.
notes: Large sample profile with several abilities.

name: Glimmerdeep Wardens
legend: Steady protectors carrying lanterns, ledgers, and unreasonable confidence.

name: Prismbound Envoys
legend: Diplomats who arrive before the invitation and leave after the mirror stops ringing.
notes: Intentionally missing points and unit size for filter checks.

name: Lantern Bastion
legend: A slow tower of glass and gears that turns dark corners into maps.
